residence.census_notes: Marital Status: Married; Relation to Head of House: Self

notes: Benjamin Franklin Burgess. Born March 26, 1845 in Baltimore, MD. Father Thomas Alexander Burgess (1795-1861) died Oct 11, 1861. Mother Alethia Caroline Burgess (1813-1861) died Jun 23, 1861 — both parents died in 1861, Benjamin was 16. Married Lillian L. Garrison on July 22, 1874 in Fauquier, Virginia. Lived in Alexandria, VA. Sons: Eugene Speiden Burgess (1875-1944), Walter N. Burgess (1878-1977). Died December 14, 1894 in DC at age 49. Buried December 16, 1894 in Alexandria, VA.
